sglang.title: Fix the Jump-Forward with Chinese
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes #549 and upgrades the Outlines version to 0.0.44.

outlines=0.0.43 has the problem of a numba bug dottxt-ai/outlines#930
It solves this using a leading \x00 at each byte.

vllm.title: Add basic correctness 2 GPU tests to 4 GPU pipeline
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This allows us to catch issues which are present when we want to run with less GPUs than are present on the node. See #5473 (comment) for context.

vllm.title: [CI][BugFix] Flip is_quant_method_supported condition
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The CUDA capability check was reversed and causing several quantization tests to be disabled.

vllm.title: [build][misc] limit numpy version
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: numpy 2.0 is just officially released. it has many breaking changes, as observed in https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci-aws/builds/1631#019022aa-6e00-4979-970c-20c73d4396d9 .

vllm.title: [Doc] add debugging tips for crash and multi-node debugging
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: Fix w8a8 benchmark and add Llama-3-8B
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix w8a8 benchmark. Now the cutlass kernel takes scales on GPU directly.
Add shapes of Llama-3-8B.

cc @mgoin @tlrmchlsmth @varun-sundar-rabindranath
